item.title: Leetcodeday38 49
item.description: dp数组及下标含义 递推公式 dp数组初始化的值 遍历顺序 打印dp数组 for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++) for (int j = 0; j <= m; j++) if (j!=0 && j % m == 0) printf("f[%d][%d]:%d \n",i,j,f[i][j]); else printf("f[%d][%d]:%d ",i,j,f[i][j]); printf("%d",f[n][m]); return 0; day38 [5

item.title: Leetcodeday17 27
item.description: day17 [110]:平衡二叉树 递归： 自顶向下：前序遍历，存在一定的重复 /* *@number[110]:平衡二叉树 *@author:lls86 *@desc: *@reference: *@time:2022-12-03 16:08:46 */ class Solution { public: int height(TreeNode *node) { if (! node) return

item.title: Leetcodeday9 16
item.description: day9 [28]:找出字符串中第一个匹配项的下标 /* * @number[28]:找出字符串中第一个匹配项的下标 * @author: lls86 * @desc: * @time:2022-11-24 16:49:02 */ class Solution { public: int strStr(string haystack, string needle) { const

item.title: Leetcodeday1 8
item.description: /* * @number[${question.frontendQuestionId}]:${question.title} * @author: lls86 * @desc: * @time:$!velocityTool.date() */ \#include "../func.h" ${question.code} day1 数组 """ @number704:二分查找 @author: lls86 @desc:双指针、数组 @time:2022-11-17 23:59:21 """ class Solution: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> int: left = 0 right = len(nums) - 1 print(right) while
